No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links copyright law to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links copyright law to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links copyright law to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and aims to provide professional knowledge and critical thinking skills for future legal careers (Target 4.4), directly supporting quality education for employment.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links copyright law to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links copyright law to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links copyright law to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Copyright law, as a legal system for cultural innovation, fosters creativity and expression, which supports entrepreneurship and decent work in cultural industries (Target 8.3).
evidence: 著作權法為文化創新的重要法制
鼓勵作者在不抄襲的條件下自由作出能呈現作者個性的表達

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course focuses on copyright law as a legal system for cultural innovation and its adaptation to digital technology, directly supporting innovation (Targets 9.5, 9.b).
evidence: 著作權法為文化創新的重要法制
因應數位科技發展所作之法制調適

Reduced Inequalities.reason: While the course mentions WTO and legal harmonization, it does not explicitly address reducing inequalities or special treatment for developing countries, making the link too indirect.
evidence: 世界貿易組織下與貿易相關之智慧財產權協定

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Copyright law protects cultural expressions, but its direct contribution to safeguarding cultural heritage within sustainable cities and communities (Target 11.4) is too tangential to warrant a score.
evidence: 促進資訊交流與文化發展

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links copyright law to responsible consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links copyright law to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links copyright law to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links copyright law to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's core focus on copyright law, its legal system, judicial practice, and international conventions directly promotes the rule of law (Target 16.3) and strengthens legal institutions (Target 16.6).
evidence: 我國著作權法之法制與司法實務發展

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly examines international copyright conventions (Berne, WIPO) and agreements (TRIPS/WTO) for legal harmonization, directly supporting international cooperation (Target 17.6) and a rules-based system (Target 17.10).
